live.title: Southampton vs Arsenal - Quarter-Final - 5 Apr 2026
live.shortDescription: Southampton host Arsenal in an FA Cup quarter-final clash at St Mary's, with the Saints chasing a Wembley semi-final spot and the Gunners aiming to rebound from their Carabao Cup final loss. Will Southampton's momentum shatter Arsenal's title charge, or will the Gunners roll on? Catch all action from the Emirates FA Cup 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.
live.longDescription: Southampton host Arsenal in an FA Cup quarter-final clash at St Mary's, with the Saints chasing a Wembley semi-final spot and the Gunners aiming to rebound from their Carabao Cup final loss. upcoming.title: Main Woh Aur Fuji
upcoming.shortDescription: In a world where love is filtered, scored and predicted, a couple in Pune collides in a fierce, consuming romance. What begins in urgency and desire slowly fractures. Seven years later, beneath the shadow of Mount Fuji, they meet again carrying different lives, different scars, confronting a past that never truly left them. Can love survive its own history or shall it merely haunt them? Witness Lalit Prabhakar and Mrinmayee Godbole in a fresh, new-age romantic movie Main Woh Aur Fuji, streaming from 10th April, on Sony LIV.
upcoming.longDescription: In a world where love is filtered, scored and predicted, a couple in Pune collides in a fierce, consuming romance. What begins in urgency and desire slowly fractures.
